subject: Breast
title: Fibroadenoma: The Breast Mouse
hook: A rubbery mobile lump in her 20s is a fibroadenoma until proven otherwise.

points.heading: Classic exam picture
bullets: Non-tender and slips under your fingers

points.heading: Reassure, do not cut
bullets: Avoid surgery for small confirmed lesions
Patient refusal is a valid reason too

points.heading: When to excise
bullets: Juvenile or large fibroadenomas come out
Symptomatic or distorting masses need excision
Fibroadenomas are non-tender so pain may persist

cta: Never mistake it for cancer again
captionLines: That rubbery lump in a 22-year-old? Classic fibroadenoma. 🩺
Rubbery, mobile, non-tender and homogeneous on ultrasound.
Biopsy-proven and under 3cm? Reassure. Excise only if juvenile, large or symptomatic.
Recall Engine turns any lecture into SBAs, MCQs, flashcards and high-yield notes so benign breast lumps become easy marks.
